title: SignalDesk LLM explanation output v1
description: Fail-closed JSON output contract for optional LLM explanations. LLMs may explain structured SignalDesk facts only; they must not add recommendations or invented market data.

summary.description: Readable explanation based only on the supplied signal_card facts.

deterministic_facts_used.description: Traceable structured facts from the prompt signal_card used in the summary.

risks.description: Risk or scope statements copied from deterministic SignalDesk context.

unavailable_context.description: Unavailable provider or LLM context that must remain visible to users.
